data.title: Meta (META) and Microsoft (MSFT) earnings reset expectations for AI-led growth. Market reprice focuses on valuation sensitivity.
data.description: Recent earnings reports from Meta (NASDAQ: META) and Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) have shifted market expectations regarding AI-led growth. Meta's results showcased strong operating leverage and disciplined monetization strategies, while Microsoft's performance emphasized the challenge of meeting heightened expectations without room for error. The market response focused on the extent to which AI advancements are already factored into stock prices, highlighting the importance of valuation sensitivity. The key takeaway is that even industry leaders face selling pressure when their guidance fails to significantly advance the narrative of growth. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gentex Corp (NASDAQ: GNTX) stock drops as revenue misses estimates with $644.401M in Q4 sales (up 19% YoY), core revenue flat at $541M. Tariffs impact China sales.
data.description: Gentex Corporation (NASDAQ: GNTX) saw its stock decrease on Friday as it met profit expectations but fell short on quarterly revenue. Despite challenges from tariffs impacting China-linked sales, management highlighted consistent core demand and improved margins. In the fourth quarter, the company reported earnings per share of 43 cents, matching analyst forecasts. Quarterly sales stood at $644.401 million, a 19% increase from the previous year, slightly below the expected $651.904 million. Additionally, $103.4 million in revenue was contributed by VOXX. Gentex's core revenue hit $541.0 million, holding steady despite a 2% decline in light-vehicle production in North America, Europe, and Japan/Korea. Revenue in these regions grew around 3% from the previous quarter. These details and more can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Air Canada will present Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 13, 2026, in a conference call with analysts at 7:30 AM ET.
data.description: Air Canada executives, including President and CEO Michael Rousseau, EVP and CFO John Di Bert, and EVP & CCO Mark Galardo, are set to conduct a conference call with analysts at 7:30 AM ET on February 13, 2026. The call aims to discuss the Q4 and full year results for 2025. After addressing analysts' inquiries, Di Bert and Vice President/Treasurer Pierre Houle will take questions from term loan B lenders and Air Canada bond holders.

data.title: Demand for transportation, skilled trade, and healthcare professionals projected to continue in 2026, millions of job positions expected in the next decade.
data.description: The U.S. Department of Labor forecasts that millions of job openings will emerge across the country in the next ten years.

data.title: Raoul Pal believes Bitcoin's long-term thesis remains intact despite October's liquidity failure and crash.
data.description: Renowned economist Raoul Pal discussed the impact of October's crypto crash, stating it revealed a structural liquidity failure that led to significant changes in market trading dynamics. This event, marked by the disappearance of liquidity due to market-maker API failures and high leverage triggering rapid liquidations via smart contracts, occurred on October 10. Pal emphasized that this liquidity issue does not indicate a fundamental breakdown in the long-term Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) outlook. In a conversation with trader Michael van de Poppe, he clarified that the crash was primarily driven by market structure issues rather than underlying fundamentals. This incident has reshaped how the market operates, highlighting the importance of considering leverage and liquidity in trading decisions.

data.title: Dr. Kofi Sarfo launches $1,000 scholarship for undergrads pursuing compassionate healthcare. Application period open.
data.description: A Las Vegas-based doctor and educator has founded an award worth $1,000 for undergraduate students dedicated to compassionate healthcare and community medicine. The Dr. Kofi Sarfo Scholarship for Future Doctors has opened its application process for individuals interested in pursuing careers in these fields.

data.title: SoFi's Q4 earnings and revenue exceed expectations, stock rises initially but later reverses down.
data.description: SoFi's stock saw an increase following the fintech company's announcement of Q4 earnings and revenue that exceeded Wall Street expectations. The report highlighted record member additions during this period. However, shortly after this news, the fintech stock experienced a reversal in direction.
